commands.command:
import scala.concurrent.Await
import scala.concurrent.duration._
val result = Await.result(future, 10.seconds)
commands.description: Await the result of a future
commands.scenario: Await the result of a future

commands.command:
import scala.concurrent.Promise
val promise = Promise[Int]()
promise.success(42)
val future = promise.future
commands.description: Use Promise to complete a future
commands.scenario: Use Promise to complete a future
